articles.title: Every firm will need to reconceptualize work as they build agentic systems. As AI and agents take on more of the execution, the opportunity is to expand human agency and redesign how work gets done. An in-depth look from the team at what this shift means and key considerations for every business: [Read more]

articles.title: New in Copilot Cowork: mobile, skills and plugins. Now available on iOS and Android, so you can delegate work from your phone, pick it back up on your desktop and keep tasks moving without breaking flow. And with new connectors, Cowork can operate across business systems and data.
